title: benstonea platystigma
intro: Benstonea platystigma, also known as the Borneo benstonea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Pandanaceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Borneo and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Benstonea platystigma include treating wounds, reducing pain and inflammation, and aiding in the healing process of various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Benstonea platystigma can be made into a topical cream or salve, which can be applied directly to the affected area to harness its medicinal properties.
